creator: roam@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks a lot for suggesting the excellent Experts Exchange site! :) 

I have just added it to the FreeBSD Handbook, the changes should be 
visible on the website in a couple of hours.  I've taken the liberty 
of removing the dash in the indexterm, so that it matches the name as 
displayed on the website, and also adding the name inside the <ulink> 
so that it actually shows in the webpage text.  If any of those changes 
seems unwise to you, please just tell us so and we will fix it at once :) 

Thanks for keeping up the EE site up and running, and thanks for 
contributing to the FreeBSD documentation! :)
